response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video content. The audio consists only of dialogue between the VTubers and background instrumental music. No songs with vocals were detected, so no web searches for lyrics were performed. The video was divided into 4 logical scenes based on the visual and content transitions.
response.global_summary: A video clip of VTubers playing a target shooting game, followed by an announcement and product advertisement. There is no vocal music performed in the video; the audio consists of dialogue and instrumental background music.

scenes.description: VTubers (Matsuri, Towa, Zeta, La+) play a shooting game with a zombie-like target.
A video of Kobo appears on a large screen, talking to the characters.
Zeta appears on a stage, addressing the audience.
A product advertisement screen is displayed.
